resources.string: ClawTV
Connecting To ClawTV
Connecting to the ClawTV server and waiting for playback state.
Receiver Ready
Waiting for the server queue to assign the next item.
Buffering
ClawTV is attaching the current stream.
Paused
Playback is paused on the server.
Finished
Waiting for the next queued item.
Receiver Needs Attention
The Android TV app could not reach the server or attach the current stream.
Restoring Session
Bringing the receiver back after the app was paused or resumed.
Kay Voice
Kay Voice
Press the mic button to talk with Kay.
Kay Is Waking Up
Pausing playback and getting ready to listen.
Listening
Speak naturally. Kay will hear the first pass locally on the Shield.
Got It
Pass 1 captured your voice and will hand the transcript to Kay next.
Voice Needs Attention
ClawTV needs microphone permission before Kay can listen.
Speech recognition is not available on this Android TV device yet.
Voice greeting is not ready yet, but ClawTV can still listen.
Heard:
Back cancels. Playback resumes automatically after this first-pass capture.
